description_long: This is a large, bulbous terracotta vase with a tall, cylindrical neck and a wide, rounded body. The surface is matte and unglazed, displaying a natural reddish-brown clay color with subtle variations in tone. Three small, rounded handles are evenly spaced around the widest part of the body, each blending smoothly into the vessel's form. The mouth of the vase is slightly uneven, giving it a handcrafted appearance. There are no visible decorative motifs or embellishments, emphasizing its utilitarian and rustic character. The overall form suggests it could be used for holding water, plants, or as a decorative urban feature.
description: A large, rustic terracotta vase with a tall neck, rounded body, and three small integrated handles. The surface is matte and unadorned, highlighting its handcrafted, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: The vase is seen with two handles visible on either side and the tall neck clearly rising from the rounded body.
description_view_1: This view shows one handle on the left and a small protruding spout or nub on the lower front, with the neck and body in full profile.
description_view_2: The vase is rotated to show the spout or nub centered, with the neck and body prominent and only one handle partially visible.
description_view_3: Two handles are visible, one on each side, with the body and neck forming a continuous, smooth silhouette.
